fields.title: agent: GC for idle agent eviction
fields.description: Add garbage collection to evict idle agents after a TTL and enforce a maximum agent count. Without GC, agents accumulate indefinitely.nnerg-effect reference: AgentManagerLive.gcImpl evicts agents idle > 5 min (AGENT_IDLE_TTL_MS), then evicts oldest idle agents if count exceeds 20 (AGENT_MAX_AGENTS). Pinned agents (main) and parents with active children are excluded.
fields.design: Add AgentConfig service (already in services.ts pattern) with maxAgents and idleTtlMs. In AgentManagerLive, implement a gc effect that: (1) iterates all agents, (2) skips agents with active children (using parent map), (3) collects idle agents whose last activity exceeds idleTtlMs, (4) if still over maxAgents, evict oldest idle first. Each evicted agent is shut down and removed. Track lastActivityAt: update it on spawn and after each prompt call resolves (status change to idle/completed/failed). Expose gc on AgentManager interface. Call gc after spawn (to enforce cap) and after wait completes (to clean up finished agents). Use the operation gate semaphore.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Agents idle for longer than the configured TTL are automatically evicted after spawn or wait. Total agent count never exceeds maxAgents. Agents with active children are not evicted. Evicted agents' status is set to shutdown.
fields.notes: Implemented idle-agent GC in AgentManager with createdAt tracking, TTL eviction, maxAgents cap eviction of oldest idle, and parent-with-active-children protection. Exposed gc on AgentManager/AgentControl, invoke GC after spawn and after wait/waitStream completion. Added default AgentConfig values (maxAgents=20, idleTtlMs=300000) via agent index runtime config wiring. Ran extensions/tau npm run gate (typecheck+lint+test): pass (lint warnings only, pre-existing).
fields.close_reason: Implemented and reviewed. GC evicts idle agents by TTL and enforces max-agent cap.
